'''Brace Tarkosa''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who worked as a crewman on ''[[Outbound Flight]]''. He was a strongly built man and one of the first hundred people recruited to the project at its start in [[29 BBY/Legends|29 BBY]]. He was two [[Standard year/Legends|years]] older than his friend on the crew, [[Chas Uliar]].<ref name="Outbound Flight" />

Tarkosa later represented the [[Survivors (Outbound Flight)|Survivors]] on the [[Managing Council]] in [[The Redoubt/Legends|the Redoubt]], where ''Outbound Flight'' crash-landed. He was also among those who were evacuated by the [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] to the [[Empire of the Hand]].<ref name="Survivor's Quest" />
